prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-LEATHPTOOL-7924LP Product Type: HOLE_PUNCH Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 9 Inch Heavy Duty Revolving Leather Hole Punch Tool 2.0-4.5mm Description: An essential tool for many leather working projects, whether you’re designing a pair of shoes or a dog collar, this leather hole punch tool features 7 different revolving punches, comfortable handling with compound design and works well with a variety of different leathers. Featuring an ergonomic grip for comfort and control, the leather working tool also includes a compound joint that can be employed by using just one hand, allowing you to create stronger, cleaning punches while keeping your other hand free for placement, leverage and alignment support. The punch heads were hardened to get through even the toughest of leathers and are rotatable for ease of use, as opposed to removable heads that go missing or are difficult to keep organized.

HOW TO USE: mark the desired location where the hole will be made; rotate the punch head until the desired punch is in line with the brass anvil; unlock the handle, then place and align the leather piece in the punch; squeeze the handle firmly until the punch pierces through the leather

Measured in millimeters, the punch sizes are 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5, 4 and 4.5

FEATURES:

- Hardened Punch Heads
- 6 Replaceable Screw On Punch Tips
- Easy to Use Revolving Head
- Revolving Head Clicks to Hold Punches Firmly Place Search Terms: leather hole punch tool punches leatherworking set belt creative ergonomic rubber handle watch bands watches handbags art supply artisan skilled handmade goods artist creator essential durable material grip Features: - HEAVY DUTY REVOLVING LEATHER PUNCH TOOL: An essential tool for many leatherworking projects, whether you’re designing a pair of shoes or a dog collar, this leather hole punch tool is heavy duty, features 7 different revolving punches, comfortable handling with compound design and works well with a variety of leathers - ERGONIMIC LEATHER HOLE PUNCH DESIGN: Featuring an ergonomic grip for comfort and control, the leatherworking tool also includes a compound joint that can be employed by using just one hand, allowing you to create stronger, cleaning punches while keeping your other hand free for placement, leverage and alignment support - VERSATILE LEATHERWORKING TOOL: Create holes in belts, clothing, watch bands, handbags, DIY crafts and more, this heavy duty revolving leather hole punch tool can be used on a wide variety of projects; the included revolving punch sizes are: 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5, 4 and 4.5 millimeters - LEATHER PUNCH TOOL USAGE: Mark the desired location where the hole will be made; Rotate the punch head until the desired punch is in line with the brass anvil; Unlock the handle, then place and align the leather piece in the punch; Squeeze the handle firmly until the punch pierces through the leather - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 5.5 x 12.2 x 9.2; Punch Sizes: 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5, 4, 4.5 millimeters; Material: Steel, Brass, Plastic; Color: Black, Red === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
